member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTestHandle.GetResult
member.summary:
If status returned is
, then returns whether something was hit, and if so nearest hit position and normal. You need to call this method until the result is ready since the shape test result may not be finished in the same frame you start the shape test.
member.remarks:
The shape test request is destroyed by this call if
is returned. If this is not called every frame then the request will be destroyed.
